messages.TexasGrant.title: Texas Grant Attestation
messages.TexasGrant.dataError: There was an error retrieving your attestation information
messages.TexasGrant.notConfigured: The card is not yet configured or configuration is not available except on Step 2 "Configuration"
messages.TexasGrant.instructions: As a condition of your Texas grant, you must attest to the following:
messages.TexasGrant.statement: I have no felony convictions or crimes involving a controlled substance.
messages.TexasGrant.answerYes: Yes, I attest this is true
messages.TexasGrant.answerNo: No, I cannot attest to this
messages.TexasGrant.thankYou: Thank you. Your response has been recorded and is final.
messages.TexasGrant.recordedYes: Recorded response: You attested you have no felony convictions or crimes involving a controlled substance.
messages.TexasGrant.recordedNo: Recorded response: You were unable to attest to having no felony convictions or crimes involving a controlled substance.
messages.TexasGrant.saveError: Your response could not be saved. Please try again or contact your administrator.
messages.TexasGrant.selectAnswer: Please select a response before submitting.
